protein_name: Component of a protein kinase signal transduction cascade. Activates the JNK, but not ERK or p38 kinase pathways. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. STE Ser/Thr protein kinase family. MAP kinase kinase kinase subfamily. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
